name: New Age Exploration Limited
summary: New Age Exploration Limited engages in the exploration and development of mineral properties in the United Kingdom and New Zealand. The company holds interest in The Quartz Hill Gold project covering an area of 1,319 square kilometers located in Otago, New Zealand; and a 100% interest in the Lochinvar coking coal project located on the Scottish/English border. New Age Exploration Limited is based in Melbourne, Australia.
